catalog_content:
Item Name: Bridgford Sweet Baby Ray’s Beef Jerky Peppered 10 oz Pack of 2 - Healthy Peppered Beef Jerky for Your Dietary Preferences - Ready-to-Eat Snacks for On-the-Go Snacking and Busy Lifestyles
Bullet Point 1: Unique Flavor: Sweet Baby Ray's Peppered Beef Jerky offers a distinct flavor profile that combines smokiness, sweetness, and a peppery kick, making it a delightful treat. Savor the perfect blend of smoky, sweet, and peppery flavors with every tender bite.
Bullet Point 2: Quality Ingredients: Made with premium cuts of beef and infused with Sweet Baby Ray's signature marinade. Our ready to eat peppered beef jerky is made with top-quality ingredients, and a time-tested process, ensuring a flavorful and satisfying meat snack.
Bullet Point 3: Protein-Rich: Packed with protein, this pepper beef jerky is a convenient and delicious way to fuel your day. Our peppered jerky snacks are an excellent choice for those seeking a nutritious snack for a post-workout snack or midday energy boost.
Bullet Point 4: Slow-Cooked Perfection: Our peppered jerky is slow-cooked to perfection, resulting in a tender texture and maximum flavor infusion, making it a snack you will always crave. Tender enough to melt in your mouth, with just the right amount of chewiness.
Bullet Point 5: Trusted Brand: Sweet Baby Ray's is a known and trusted brand, renowned for our delicious barbecue sauces and now extending our signature flavor to beef jerky, ensuring a taste sensation you can trust which is backed by decades of experience and expertise.
Product Description: Bridgford Sweet Baby Ray’s Beef Jerky Peppered is the perfect blend of Bridgford’s authentic, natural style beef jerky and seasonings with America’s #1 barbecue sauce, Sweet Baby Ray’s. Packed with protein and free from artificial additives or preservatives, it's the perfect snack for fueling your active lifestyle. Take this tender beef jerky snack anywhere, it’s the perfect choice for a busy lifestyle! Each tender strip of beef is carefully seasoned and slowly cooked to perfection, ensuring a mouthwatering snack that's perfect for any occasion.
Value: 20.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium positioning with trusted brand collaboration (Sweet Baby Ray's BBQ sauce). High-protein, slow-cooked jerky with no artificial additives suggests mid-to-high price range. 'Big Bag!' and 'Pack of 2' indicate value-oriented bulk packaging. Quality ingredients and slow-cooking process justify premium pricing.
